calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-14-2010 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Sep-09-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr., Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Martin Hoffmann, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Chase Bank USA, N.A.
No appearance by defendant Zhiquan Wu.
Default was entered against defendant on July 13, 2010.
Doe defendants were dismissed on August 18, 2010.
Order waiving witness appearance at default prove-up hearing was filed on August 30, 2010.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Chase Bank USA, N.A., and against the Defaulted Defendant Zhiquan Wu as follows:

Damages/Principal - $25,994.40.
Prejudgment Interest - $2,405.51.
Attorney's Fees - Waived.
Costs - $479.50, for a total judgment in the amount of $28,879.41.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
